falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (current level + 10% in 14 days)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this threshold would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield drops below 3.8% and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal strong risk-on sentiment and contradict the blowoff score's implied bearish pressure, falsifying the current pattern match.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index declines below 18 (current level - 25% in 14 days)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp drop in volatility would indicate market complacency and disprove the pattern's implied instability, invalidating the UNKNOWN phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
